data.body:
## Description

**What**: Add a hard gate block to the fix-bug SKILL.md preamble that explicitly states Steps 1-5 must complete before any code modification.
**Why**: Agents sometimes read the skill but rationalize skipping steps because the bug "looks simple." A prominent hard gate at the top of the skill reinforces the sequential requirement.
**Scope**:
- IN: Add HARD-GATE block to SKILL.md preamble (similar pattern to brainstorm skill)
- OUT: Orchestrator enforcement logic (stories 91bf-a66b, b094-3cf4)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, the fix-bug SKILL.md contains a HARD-GATE block in the preamble that explicitly prohibits code modification before completing Steps 1-5 (classify, investigate, hypothesis test, approve, RED test)
  ← Satisfies: "The fix-bug SKILL.md preamble includes a hard gate reinforcing that Steps 1-5 must complete before any code modification"
- Unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Maintainability] Use the same HARD-GATE tag pattern used in brainstorm SKILL.md for consistency
